title: Teladoc Health Inc (TDOC) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Navigating Challenges and Opportunities
text: Teladoc Health Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights. Q4 2025 Results: Consolidated revenue $642 million, Adjusted EBITDA $84 million (13% margin), Net loss per share $0.14, Beat expectations on both top and bottom lines. Full year 2025 results: Consolidated revenue $2.53 billion (1.5% lower than prior year) with adjusted EBITDA $281 million (11.1% margin). 2026 Guidance: Revenue $2.47B-$2.587B with consensus at $2.55B. Non-GAAP EPS ($1.10) - ($0.70), consensus $0.86. Key Headwinds: Tariff headwind $5M-$7M in 2026 (up from $3M in 2025). US integrated care membership expected to decline modestly due to government program reductions and ACA enhanced subsidies expiration. Opportunities: Strong ramping of BetterHelp revenues with strong growth in sessions and utilization supporting confidence in 2026 ramp.
